name: nanyang-logistics-planner
description: A SAP-style logistics planner with Google Sheets-like interface designed for sand and gravel company daily trip management.

scripts.init: git init && git add . && git commit -m "Initial commit"
scripts.deploy: npm run add && npm run commit "Deploy: %date%" && npm run push
scripts.quick-push: git add . && git commit -m "Quick update: %date%" && git push origin main
scripts.setup-remote: echo Please run: git remote add origin https://github.com/insidedeveloper888/nanyang.git
scripts.setup-auth: echo Please set your GitHub token: set GITHUB_TOKEN=your_token_here
scripts.set-user: git config user.name "Your Name" && git config user.email "your.email@example.com"
scripts.help: echo Available commands: npm run status, npm run add, npm run commit "message", npm run push, npm run quick-push

author: Your Name
